offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inaccurate financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to un-reconciled transactions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Join community forums sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Gather 10 short interviews from potential users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
